data.title: Update CLAUDE.md config keys documentation
data.description:
Add implementation_plan.approach_resolution to the Config keys section of CLAUDE.md with description of valid values (autonomous, interactive) and default (autonomous).

TDD Exemption: Unit exemption criterion 3 — documentation file, no conditional logic.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Config key documented in CLAUDE.md
  Verify: grep -q 'implementation_plan.approach_resolution' CLAUDE.md
